flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lebanon Valley College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($26.4k → $30.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lebanon Valley College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.2k → $52.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lebanon Valley College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
